The '''Mark II medium repeating blaster cannon''' was a [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]] manufactured by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]], and was one of the weapons used to defend the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] from invading [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].

The Mark II was easily deployed under barren circumstances for it could accept power from many different sources. The Mark II was mounted on a tripod and could be operated by a single [[gunner]]. Mark IIs deployed by the Rebel Alliance were used against [[Infantry/Legends|infantry]] troops, since it did not have the power to punch through the armor of the [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transports]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].
